data.title: Bike Mobility domain context
data.summary: Internal context describing Bike Mobility Services as a digital employer-bike platform connecting employers, employees, and dealers, with growth ambitions across Europe and increasing importance of platform, data, and ecosystem control.

data.title: Pon: Bike Mobility Services overview
data.summary: Evidence for the employer-bike-service model, current scale signals, and the role of Lease a Bike and BusinessBike in multiple markets.

data.title: Cycling Industries Europe on company bike leasing and corporate fleets
data.summary: Evidence that company bike leasing and corporate fleets are becoming meaningful levers in European clean-mobility policy and employer mobility programs.

data.title: Cycling Industries Europe: JobRad company profile
data.summary: Reference point for the operational scale, employer adoption, and category expectations in the bike-leasing market.

data.title: EIT Urban Mobility on sustainable last-mile delivery
data.summary: Supports the adjacent pooled-fleet and bike-logistics opportunity, especially for short-distance operational tasks and city-center logistics.

data.title: Proposed 500-person organization design for Bike Mobility
data.summary: Recommended value-stream and platform-oriented structure covering employer growth, rider experience, partner operations, lease-finance lifecycle, fleet mobility, and shared platform/data.
